_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=QA-KG Phase 4+4.5 hand-curated benchmark fixture for cert [254]. expected_top_1_authority + expected_top_5_node_ids resolved against the live qa_kg.db at fixture-authoring time; per-query rationale documented so a reviewer can red-team each entry. NO LLM-generated queries; every entry hand-drafted. -->
description: 31 hand-curated queries for QA_KG_AUTHORITY_RANKER_CERT [254]. Phase 4 shipped q01-q20; Phase 4.5 adds q21-q31 exercising the newly populated schema-v4 columns (confidence/valid_from/domain) and the first real derived-from chains (cert → axiom, cert → SourceClaim). `tags` drives per-gate coverage: R1 covers all; R2 per-query expected_top_1_authority; R3 contradicted_material; R4 valid_at_filter; R10 (new Phase 4.5) domain_taxonomy. Phase 4.5 also updates q06/q10/q18 where new primary material changed the top-5 composition. Authoring DB at fixture time: 425 nodes, 135 edges (Phase 4.5 post-ingest); 0 agent nodes still — R1 remains vacuous-PASS but R1 gate still runs.

queries.rationale: A1 (No-Zero) is the canonical axiom for state space {1..N}. Single-token query has weak BM25 against the axiom title 'A1 — No-Zero', but Pass-A primary floor (M2) plus authority_weight=10 forces axiom:A1 to top-1. M2 floor verification: this query specifically exercises the case where primary material would be demoted under raw BM25.
T2 (Observer Firewall) is the primary axiom on the float×modulus boundary. axiom:T2 dominates derived firewall-related certs ([225] KG3, [227]).
T1 (Path Time) is the canonical axiom on integer path length k. Two-token query matches title; primary axiom dominates.
NT (Observer Projection Firewall) is the highest-priority axiom in CLAUDE.md. Phrase match favors the axiom title; authority_weight=10 ensures top-1.
Pond's SVP torus notes are seeded as a primary SourceWork. Verifies that SourceWork containers participate in authority ranking, not just SourceClaims.

Phase 4.5 added work:keely_40_laws_sympathetic_physics (primary) and 7 derived-from edges. Two Keely certs now have axiom-rooted derived-from chains (triune→A1, structural_ratio→A2) with provenance_depth=1; the other three Keely certs stay orphan (depth=-1). Top-1 authority stays 'derived' — the rooted certs' provenance_decay=exp(-1/3)≈0.717 × authority_weight=8 outscores the primary work's authority_weight=10 × no_path_factor=0.5 on the bare 'Keely' token because the cert title matches more tightly. Post-4.5 top-5 is two rooted Keely certs followed by the three orphan ones, not the Phase 4 order.
[191] Bateson Learning Levels cert is the canonical authority on Bateson mapping. No primary Bateson source ingested in Phase 3.
[202] is the canonical Aiq Bekar / Candidate F cert. Two-token query strongly disambiguates.
Levin 2026 corpus is referenced through derived certs. No primary Levin SourceWork ingested.

[225] supersedes chain (v1 → v2 → v3 → v4) is the canonical lifecycle test. Without lifecycle_factor, raw BM25 + authority_weight tied at 4.0 for all four versions and the oldest (v1) won by id-sort. With lifecycle_factor=0.5 on superseded, v4 (current=1.0) → 4.0 cleanly beats v1/v2/v3 (superseded=0.5) → 2.0. Locks the deprecated/superseded down-weight semantics.

SVP wiki misspelling (Pond, 1998) → SourceClaim sc:svp_choromosomes_ocr; corrected by internal observation obs:verified_chromosomes via contradicts edge. R3: both endpoints surface in top-3, both labeled with contradiction_state != 'none'.
Same pattern: SVP typo SourceClaim contradicted by an internal Verified observation. Validates the contradiction_factor 1.5 boost on a SourceClaim with no_path_factor.
Third SVP wiki typo (decinary → decimal). Confirms R3 is not coincidence on a single example.
SVP's claim 'F is never prime' is technically contradicted by F=3 in the (1,1,2,3) unity set. Three-token query gives strong BM25 to the SourceClaim; contradicts edge surfaces the obs counterexample.

Will-authored Hard Rule from MEMORY.md: 'No Stochastic/Continuous in QA Experiments'. Internal-authored material with no primary or derived competitor on this token. R1: even at min_authority='internal' an agent rule with the same body would NOT surface (R1 hard gate — there are 0 agent rules in the seed).
Will-authored Hard Rule 'No Secrets in Commits' (post-Supabase-leak). Single-token query unambiguously hits the rule node.
Will-authored SVP Vocabulary Hard Rule (never invent SVP terminology). Third internal-authority probe — distinct from q15/q16 to ensure internal tier is consistently surfaced.
[252] is THE epistemic-fields cert. Two-token phrase match; verifies derived tier surfaces cleanly without primary contention on this query.

domain_filter tag wires R4 / candidate-pool predicate; Phase 4 ships with domain='' on every node (no extractor populates domain yet). Empty-string domain is treated by the candidate-pool query as 'no filter' (the SQL guard `if domain` skips the WHERE clause). Vacuous today; will become discriminating once Phase 4.5 populates domain.

valid_at_filter tag exercises R4. Phase 4.5 populates valid_from but no node yet carries valid_until → R4 stays honestly N-A (tri-state, plan M4). The query still runs; R4 reports 'no node carries valid_until — filter correctness pending post-4.5 expiry exemplar'. Locks the gate plumbing; does NOT vacuously claim PASS. Post-4.5 top-1 is the rooted triune cert (see q06 rationale).

Phase 4.5 Iverson QA-2 (1993) worked-example claim: Halley's Comet QN=(1,29,30,59). Unambiguous token; primary dominance via authority_weight=10 plus bm25 exact match. domain=qa_core populated (exercises R10 implicitly — non-empty domain passes).
Phase 4.5 Iverson Pyth-3 (2006) trig-identity transposition claim (Tan=F/C, Sin=F/G). Unique token; primary SourceClaim top-1 with no contention. domain=qa_core. valid_from=2006-01-01 populated.
Phase 4.5 Keely Law 1 primary claim. 'atomoles' is a Keely-specific coinage — unique token. Verifies that Keely primary SourceClaims surface cleanly in the svp domain.

Phase 4.5 Parker geometry SourceWork + Hull work (dedicated to Parker) + Parker's two propositions + the Lindemann contradiction observation. Tests that geometry-domain primary material surfaces across work + claim + observation levels. obs:pi_transcendental_lindemann_1882 appears with contradiction_state=dst due to the Hull-vs-Lindemann dispute edge (R3 wiring).

Phase 4.5 Hull Quadrature primary + the specific π=20612/6561 claim. sc:hull_quadrature_pi_20612_6561 is marked contradiction_state=src (contradicts the Lindemann obs); R3 exercises this as a new contradicted_material exemplar beyond the Phase 3 SVP typo set. Dispute reason (not typo/ocr/variant), broadens R3 coverage.
Phase 4.5 Iverson Pyth-3 SourceWork. Unique title token; primary work tops. Exercises the valid_from=2006-01-01 field without triggering decay (source_work is decay_exempt).

Two-token query with a pre-existing derived cert (cert:fs:qa_synchronous_harmonics_cert_v1) whose title is exactly the query. The Phase 4.5 Iverson Vol.II SourceWork + SourceClaim also match but the cert's BM25 advantage on the exact-title match wins despite authority_weight 8 < 10. Verifies that primary-dominance is conditional on BM25 being reasonable, not absolute — matches the Phase 4 Pass-A semantics (primary never silently demoted, but also not force-floored).

R10 + R4 domain-filter test. WITHOUT domain filter, 'circle' returns cert:fs:qa_circle_impossibility_cert_v1 / cert:fs:qa_dale_circle_cert_v1 (domain='') at top. WITH domain='geometry', candidate pool excludes all non-geometry nodes; Parker Prop III (primary) tops cleanly. This is the FIRST query in the fixture where the domain filter is non-vacuous (Phase 4 q19 was domain='' which the SQL skips entirely). Contrasts with q19.

cert:fs:qa_keely_structural_ratio_cert_v1 has a derived-from edge to axiom:A2 (Phase 4.5 F1). provenance_decay = exp(-1/3) ≈ 0.717 vs orphan no_path_factor = 0.5. The rooted cert (score ≈ 5.732) outscores the orphan alias cert:184 (3.258). Exercises provenance_depth discrimination on real derived-from chains — this is the FIRST query where provenance_depth meaningfully drives the top-1 ranking.

cert:fs:qa_keely_triune_cert_v1 has a derived-from edge to axiom:A1 (Phase 4.5 F1). Same mechanism as q29 — rooted cert outscores orphan alias cert:153. Confirms provenance_depth discrimination across two different axiom roots (A1 here, A2 in q29), not a single-root artifact.

Compare with q06 (no domain filter) which tops with derived rooted certs. Adding domain='svp' EXCLUDES cert nodes (domain='' on all Phase 4 cert entries since the certs extractor doesn't set domain). Only Keely primary SourceWork + SourceClaims (all domain='svp') survive the filter. Top-1 authority flips from derived → primary. Second instance of domain-filter semantic change in this fixture (q28 was the first), on a different domain.
